checks.description: Front-door shell copy and startup framing
Help, settings, leaderboard, account, and feedback panels
Frame-sized popout bounds and one-open-overlay switching
Pilot records and account replay panel surface
Leaderboard build/date trust context and filtering
Graphics options and visible rendering controls
Production developer lock and Root backdoor

profile.title: Audio Cue Alignment Correspondence
profile.purpose: Compare the most timing-sensitive Aurora gameplay audio cues against the shipped local baseline and the preserved Galaga-aligned timing targets.

metrics.label: First Stage Pulse After Formation Arrival
Game Start Tail Past First Pulse
Result Cue Tail Past Next Cue

audioEventGapRun.nextStep: Tune the highest segment-level gap next: challengePerfect onset. Rerun audio comparison and event-gap analysis after the change.

categories.label: Player movement conformance
categories.read: Current movement scored 10/10 against the control-principles profile, versus 10/10 for the shipped local baseline.

categories.label: Shot and hit responsiveness
categories.read: Close-shot responsiveness passed, and movement-fire post-shot travel was 50.08, with shot delay 6ms.

categories.label: Stage-1 opening timing fidelity
categories.read: 4/4 metrics were within tolerance; worst current delta was 0.18.

categories.label: Stage-1 opening geometry fidelity
categories.read: Geometry held steady with 0 changed targets and max drift 0.

categories.label: Dive fairness and safety
categories.read: Shared stage-2 safety seeds passed, which keeps the early dive/collision windows within the intended persona guardrail.

categories.label: Capture and rescue rule fidelity
categories.read: 3/3 capture scenarios matched, with worst tracked-time drift 0.004.

categories.label: Challenge-stage timing fidelity
categories.read: 5/5 challenge timing metrics were within tolerance; worst current delta was 0.032.

categories.label: Progression and persona depth
categories.read: 19/20 persona checks passed; progression ordering is still missing one ordering edge case.

categories.label: Boss entry and formation grammar

pathFamilyReferenceLabelSupport.playerMeaning: Aurora path families can now be judged against committed Galaga contact-sheet labels, but not yet against tracked reference trajectories or rack-slot coordinates.

pathFamilyReferenceTrajectoryComparison.playerMeaning: Aurora now has an active vector/rack comparison, but the paths are not yet close enough to Galaga reference vectors to lift the broad label-backed cap.

weakestMetric.label: Path shape and set-formation precision
weakestMetric.calculation: Media-backed path-family comparison score from extracted runtime trajectories and accepted Galaga contact-sheet labels, capped below future tracked reference-trajectory comparison.
weakestMetric.currentRead: 600 tracks classified into path families; expected family coverage 1; accepted Galaga labels 6 regular / 4 challenge; trajectory-vector/rack score 5.3/10 (reference-trajectory-vector-comparison-active-no-cap-lift); cap 8.2/10 (media-backed-reference-label-cap).
weakestMetric.success: Runtime boss/escort/challenge path traces and formation slot positions are available first, then promoted to direct reference comparison against Galaga path families.

strongestMetric.label: Formation settle evidence
strongestMetric.calculation: 55% regular-window formation-active settle proxy plus 45% runtime rack/challenge slot-coordinate extraction coverage.
strongestMetric.currentRead: 7/7 regular windows expose formation-active counts; path-slot extraction found 600 slot tracks.
strongestMetric.success: Evidence captures formation-active counts and, in the next scorer version, target rack slot geometry by stage.

details.topProblem: Boss/escort path-shape precision now has media-backed Galaga path-family labels; the next cap is tracked reference trajectory and rack-slot comparison.
details.strategy: Promote boss/escort/challenge path traces, formation slot coordinates, and stage-family entry labels into the ingestion corpus, then use this scorer to rank stage scripts and runtime changes.
details.successMeasure: Raise this family above 8.0/10 with path-shape precision above 5.0/10, minimum regular-stage signature distance above 0.16, and at least two challenge windows with distinct pattern identity.

categories.read: Boss/formation grammar scores 9.4/10 across 11 evidence windows; weakest metric is Path shape and set-formation precision (8.2/10).

categories.label: Level arc and encounter shape

strongestSubmetric.label: Stage distinctiveness
strongestSubmetric.read: 6/6 stage families are blueprinted and 11/6 target evidence windows are present; stage-signature distinct pair ratio is 1.

weakestSubmetric.label: Long-run non-repetition
weakestSubmetric.read: Stage-signature repetition risk is 0; closest pair is late-run-crown-entry / late-run-escort-variant.

nextRecommendedWork: improve Stage 4 pressure replay precision so source loss windows reproduce as exact deterministic windows
preserve stage-8 flank and stage-14 escort grammar while adding the next measured challenge/reward slice

advance boss/formation grammar by targeting Path shape and set-formation precision: 600 tracks classified into path families; expected family coverage 1; accepted Galaga labels 6 regular / 4 challenge; trajectory-vector/rack score 5.3/10 (reference-trajectory-vector-comparison-active-no-cap-lift); cap 8.2/10 (media-backed-reference-label-cap).

mid-run-entry-variant and mid-run-pressure are too similar by computed gameplay signature distance (0.106). Strategy: Use the feature trace to add one distinct movement/reward grammar to the weaker window, then rerun stage-signature distance.
implement one challenge-stage movement and reward slice with clear perfect/near-perfect feedback

categories.read: Level arc score is 8.8/10 with 6/6 stage families blueprinted and 11/6 evidence windows present; weakest submetric is Long-run non-repetition (6/10).

categories.label: Audio identity and cue alignment
categories.read: Audio score blends cue identity, active reference similarity, reference-window precision, overlap timing, cue alignment, semantic event mapping, and acoustic event-gap severity. 0/21 reference windows still need tighter segmentation; 25 candidate subwindows were found; semantic event score is 9.78/10, acoustic event score is 6.53/10, and highest segment risk is challengePerfect onset.

categories.label: UI, shell, and graphics integrity
categories.read: The bundled front-door, panel, dock, graphics, attract, leaderboard, and audio shell surface suite passed.
